_comment: Example AppControl application definition for Azure VM management
_usage: Import via API: curl -X POST https://<backend>/api/v1/applications -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' -d @example-app.json
name: Azure Demo Infrastructure
description: Demo application managing Azure VMs via AppControl

components.name: database-vm
components.check_cmd: az vm get-instance-view -g ${AZURE_RG} -n db-server --query "instanceView.statuses[?starts_with(code,'PowerState/')].displayStatus" -o tsv | grep -q 'VM running'

components.name: app-server-vm
components.check_cmd: az vm get-instance-view -g ${AZURE_RG} -n app-server --query "instanceView.statuses[?starts_with(code,'PowerState/')].displayStatus" -o tsv | grep -q 'VM running'

components.name: web-frontend-vm
components.check_cmd: az vm get-instance-view -g ${AZURE_RG} -n web-frontend --query "instanceView.statuses[?starts_with(code,'PowerState/')].displayStatus" -o tsv | grep -q 'VM running'
